basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 30 June 2026 on the official website of IIT Roorkee. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Roorkee Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in any discipline of Planning with a valid GATE Score.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_roorkee: Postgraduate degree in any discipline of Planning with a valid GATE Score.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Research Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Roorkee Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Roorkee Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Roorkee Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Postgraduate degree in any discipline of Planning with a valid GATE Score.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
IIT Roorkee Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Roorkee Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Roorkee Research Associate Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date for application is 08-07-2026. Candidates are encouraged to submit their applications well before this date to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The required qualification is a Postgraduate degree in any discipline of Planning along with a valid GATE Score. This ensures candidates have a strong academic background in the relevant field.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 45,000. This is a competitive stipend for a contract research position.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate position at IIT Roorkee. This is a single opening, so interested candidates should prepare thoroughly.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person on the specified date and time.

faq.question: Q6. What is the walk-in date for the Research Associate interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted on 09-07-2026. It is advisable to reach the venue early to complete the registration process.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IIT Roorkee Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Interview. Candidates will be assessed based on their qualifications, experience, and performance during the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: IIT Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 247667. This is the venue for the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs. A duly filled application form might also be required.
